seo.title: RAG Retrieval Quality Optimization in CrewAI Agents
seo.description: How to detect and fix rag retrieval quality optimization in CrewAI agents. Framework-specific detection, fixes, and Vex automation.

content.intro: In CrewAI, RAG Retrieval Quality Optimization issues manifest when agents retrieve irrelevant or incomplete context from knowledge bases, leading to poor task execution across crew roles. Agents often pass hallucinated or low-quality retrieval outputs between each other, causing delegation loops and task drift as they reinterpret flawed context. This results in inconsistent output quality, especially in multi-agent workflows dependent on shared RAG-sourced information.

howItManifests.scenario: Research agent retrieves outdated documents for market analysis task
howItManifests.symptom: Agent delegates to analyst with irrelevant 2022 data instead of current sources
howItManifests.impact: Analyst produces inaccurate recommendations, cascading errors through crew

howItManifests.scenario: Content writer agent gets low-relevance chunks for blog generation
howItManifests.symptom: Output contains factual inaccuracies and generic filler content
howItManifests.impact: Editor agent forced into endless revision loops with writer

howItManifests.scenario: Legal reviewer retrieves incomplete case law context
howItManifests.symptom: Agent hallucinates missing precedents and cites non-existent sources
howItManifests.impact: Final compliance agent rejects entire workflow output

howItManifests.scenario: Customer support agent pulls wrong knowledge base articles
howItManifests.symptom: Resolution agent provides incorrect troubleshooting steps
howItManifests.impact: Task drift leads to customer escalation and crew restart

detection.name: Retrieval Relevance Score Check
detection.description: Monitor cosine similarity between query and top-k retrieved chunks in CrewAI agents
detection.code:
import numpy as np
from crewai import Agent, Task

def check_retrieval_relevance(query, retrieved_chunks, threshold=0.7):
    # Mock embedding function (replace with your embedding model)
    def embed(text): 
        return np.random.rand(384)  # Use sentence-transformers
    
    query_emb = embed(query)
    scores = [np.dot(query_emb, embed(chunk)) for chunk in retrieved_chunks]
    avg_relevance = np.mean(scores)
    return {
        'relevant': avg_relevance > threshold,
        'avg_score': avg_relevance,
        'issue': 'Low retrieval relevance' if avg_relevance < threshold else None
    }

detection.description: Track task delegation patterns in CrewAI to detect RAG quality loops

fixes.name: Hybrid Retrieval with Re-ranking
fixes.description: Implement BM25 + semantic search with cross-encoder re-ranking in CrewAI agents

fixes.name: Context Faithfulness Enforcement
fixes.description: Force CrewAI agents to cite retrieved chunks and validate against context

fixes.name: Multi-Query Retrieval Expansion
fixes.description: Generate query variants for better coverage in CrewAI RAG pipeline
fixes.code:
def generate_query_variants(original_query):
    variants = [
        original_query,
        original_query + ' examples',
        original_query + ' tutorial',
        original_query.replace('how to', 'steps for'),
        original_query + ' best practices'
    ]
    return variants

# Usage in CrewAI agent
task = Task(
    description="""Retrieve using these expanded queries:
{generate_query_variants('optimize RAG retrieval')}
Combine best results from all variants."""
)

vexAutomation.heading: Automating RAG Retrieval Quality Optimization Detection with Vex
vexAutomation.description:
Vex integrates seamlessly as a callback step in every CrewAI agent task, automatically monitoring retrieval relevance, context faithfulness, and delegation patterns. When RAG quality drops below configured thresholds, Vex triggers remediation workflows like query expansion, re-ranking, or task delegation to specialist retrieval agents. This prevents low-quality context from propagating through the crew, eliminating delegation loops and ensuring consistent output quality.

The Vex SDK provides CrewAI-specific detectors for the most common failure modes, with one-line integration. Configure thresholds for relevance scores, hallucination rates, and loop detection, and Vex handles real-time monitoring and automatic fixes. Dashboards provide visibility into retrieval quality trends across all crew runs.
vexAutomation.code:
from crewai import Agent, Task, Crew
from vex_sdk import VexMonitor

# Install: pip install crewai vex-sdk

vex = VexMonitor(
    detectors=[
        'rag_relevance',
        'context_hallucination',
        'delegation_loops'
    ],
    thresholds={'relevance': 0.75, 'hallucination': 0.3}
)

researcher = Agent(
    role='Researcher',
    goal='Find accurate information',
    backstory='Expert researcher',
    verbose=True,
    step_callback=vex.monitor_task  # Vex integration
)

# Vex auto-fixes low quality retrievals
task = Task(
    description='Research market trends',
    agent=researcher,
    context_callback=vex.enrich_context  # Auto-improves retrieval
)

crew = Crew(agents=[researcher], tasks=[task], verbose=True)
result = crew.kickoff()

cta.heading: Detect and Fix This Automatically with Vex
cta.description: Install Vex SDK and add one line to your CrewAI agents to eliminate RAG quality issues forever.
